name: symphony-tools
description: Symphony MCP and orchestration skill for Linear-backed Codex worker pilots.

interface.longDescription: Symphony Tools packages the local Symphony MCP adapter and orchestration skill for Codex planner-side Linear issue creation, daemon monitoring, refresh ticks, and handoff review. Secrets stay in the local Codex secrets directory, and issue creation or dispatch actions remain prompt-gated.
defaultPrompt: Monitor Symphony worker state or review a handoff.
